scripts.build:server: npm run build:ai-core && npm run build --prefix server
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test:ci && npm run build
scripts.check:ai-core: cd packages/ai-core && npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run build
scripts.check:server: npm run build:ai-core && cd server && npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run build
scripts.check:functions: npm run build:ai-core && cd functions && npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run build
scripts.check:all: npm run check && npm run check:ai-core && npm run check:server && npm run check:functions
scripts.test:all: npm test && cd packages/ai-core && npm test && cd ../.. && cd server && npm test && cd .. && cd functions && npm test
scripts.build:all: npm run build:ai-core && npm run build && npm run build:server && cd functions && npm run build
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint && cd packages/ai-core && npm run lint && cd ../.. && cd server && npm run lint && cd .. && cd functions && npm run lint
scripts.format:all: npm run format:check && cd packages/ai-core && npm run format:check && cd ../.. && cd server && npm run format:check && cd .. && cd functions && npm run format:check
